description:
Set interval of emitting particles from particle source. In Arma 3 hardcoded limit of how many particles can exist at the same time is {{Link|link= http://forums.bistudio.com/showthread.php?177797-Ruin-your-copy-of-Arma-and-your-PC#post2691090|text= 18000}}. Correspondence between CfgCloudlets class param name and command param:
<sqf>particleSource setDropInterval interval;</sqf>
name: setDropInterval
